channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-1222] MDS crashes while running simul
item.description: MDS crash with general protection fault, console output attached

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Integrated in lustre-dev » x86_64,client,el6,inkernel #340
LU-1222 ldlm: Fix the race in AST sender vs multiple arriving RPCs (Revision 5c3a69e52444f8ea17849df1f9de0465d1398224)

Result = SUCCESS
Oleg Drokin : 5c3a69e52444f8ea17849df1f9de0465d1398224
Files :

  • lustre/ldlm/ldlm_lockd.c

ok, uploading kernel and debuginfo now

Thanks.
vmlinux is not included.
Please upload kernel-debuginfo rpm too
Oleg - I uploaded the lustre stuff, not sure if the vmlinux is included in these rpm's or not. Let me know if you need more.
please also include lustre-modules and kernel-debuginfo (or gzipped vmlinux with debug info not stripped from there) as well.
uploading now

Nathan

Thanks for this! I just sent you details of how to send us a file that is too big for JIRA to cope with

Peter
We have what might be a similar failure (kernel tries to wake a missing mds task) in CLSTR-73, see attachment. We have the full 172MB vmcore as well, but it's too big for your Jira.

So it looks like here we tried to wake a task that was no longer present and tripped some unused memory as result.

How could this happen is not entirely clear.
Too bad the kdump failed.

Oleg

Could you please look into this one?

Thanks

Peter
console output
